title: Stoddle's Simple Mech Datapack
description: Datapack that adds customizable mechs to the game.
body:
# 📖 The basics This datapack adds simple and customizable mechs to the game. Perfect to spice up your survival world or add to your modpack. The datapack also has multiplayer compatibility if you're feeling like fighting your friends in an epic mech battle. To make yourself a mech you will first have to make an assembly station and place it on the ground. From there you will need to craft an upper mech body, a lower mech body and an energy cell and assemble all three pieces at the assembly station by right-clicking. Once assembled, you will be able to pilot the mech, change its different attachments or color it with a dye of your choice. Every recipes are unlocked automatically, in order, as your craft items from the datapack. The recipe for the assembly station is unlocked when collecting an iron ingot for the first time. If needed, a list of all the recipes will be provided down below. For creative players, you can use the command "/function core:items/give_items" to instantly give yourself every item needed. Check the "README.txt" file located in the datapack .zip file for a list of other useful commands. Mechs can be repaired with iron blocks. # 📋 Recipes ![List of recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14db65a99ea3981615bda7f8d98bf931536bfd72.png) # 📋 How to install/uninstall Download "Stoddle's Simple Mechs (datapack)" and put the .zip file in the datapacks folder of the world you want to play in. Download "Stoddle's Simple Mechs (resourcepack)" and put the .zip file in your resourcepacks folder. Enable the resourcepack in the settings and you'll be ready to go! To uninstall, enter the command "/function core:uninstall" and remove the datapack from the datapacks folder or your world. # 🔍 FAQ >Q: Where is the resourcepack? I can't see the models and textures.
A: The resourcepack is located here on modrinth. It's a seperated file underneath the download for the datapack when on the page of the desired version. On this modrinth page, click on "Versions" then click on the desired version and the resourcepack will be located in the "Files" section right under the datapack. >Q: Can I use this datapack in my modpack or adventure map?
A: Of course you can! Just make sure to give proper credit :) >Q: Can you add [insert idea you have here] to the datapack?
A: I always take note of the feedback I get and try my best to add requested features in my datapacks whenever I update them. >Q: Could you downgrade the datapack to another version?
A: No, sorry :( >Q: Does this datapack work on servers?
A: Yos # ⚠️ Dislcaimer regarding datapack conflicts I am not held accountable for any conflicts with other datapacks you have installed. It may be better to use this datapack standalone to avoid any problems or if you aren't sure of what you are doing. # ⚖️ License This project is licensed under the Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike 4.0 International (CC BY-NC-SA 4.0) license. You may use and modify the datapack as you please, as long as proper credit is given to the original author, do not use it for commercial purposes, and share any modifications under the same license.
